name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Blocks 99% of UVA and UVB rays to protect your eyes during sunny days.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Lightweight and breathable floral dress perfect for beach days and summer outings. Made from 100% organic cotton.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Water-resistant SPF 50 sunscreen lotion that protects your skin from harmful UV rays. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Beach Tote Bag
description: Spacious and stylish beach tote bag with waterproof lining. Perfect for carrying all your beach essentials.

name: Cooling Face Mist
description: Refreshing face mist with aloe vera and cucumber extract. Keeps your skin hydrated and cool all summer long.

name: Inflatable Pool Float
description: Giant inflatable pool float in fun summer shapes. Made from durable PVC material, perfect for pool parties.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim straw sun hat with UPF 50+ protection. Stylish and functional for beach trips and outdoor events.

name: Waterproof Sandals
description: Comfortable waterproof sandals with non-slip sole. Perfect for beach walks, pool areas, and casual summer outings.
